seo.title: MGtechAD | Websites and systems for growing businesses
seo.description: Conversion-focused landing pages, business websites and custom systems for companies that want a stronger presence, more leads and cleaner operations.

hero.eyebrow: For service businesses that need to sell better
hero.subtitle: Design and development with a commercial focus for businesses that need a stronger presence, clearer positioning and a smoother path to conversion.
hero.point_1: Fast replies and a clear process
hero.preview_title: Three clear ways to start with a serious solution
hero.preview_subtitle: A quick view so visitors can understand where they can start, what the entry point costs in DOP and USD, and the rough timeframe.

offers.title: Solutions designed to help you sell better from the start
offers.subtitle: Three clear formats with pricing in DOP and USD so visitors can quickly understand what fits and what it costs to begin
offers.note_text: These prices are positioned at roughly 10% below the entry points currently published by comparable agencies in the Dominican market. USD figures are approximate using 1 USD ≈ DOP 60.
offers.flex_note: Final pricing adjusts to scope, content depth and any integrations required.
offers.addon_title: Monthly maintenance and improvements from DOP 5,500 / US$92
offers.addon_desc: Typical range: DOP 5,500 to 11,000 / US$92 to US$184, ideal if you want ongoing support, small improvements and follow-through without opening a bigger project each time.
offers.addon_note: It also works well if you want performance improvements, new sections or ongoing campaign support without rebuilding the whole site.

landing.name: Conversion landing page
landing.promise: For businesses that need a stronger first impression, clearer messaging and a faster path to qualified inquiries.
landing.description: A focused page built around value proposition, visual trust and one main CTA that pushes the right action.
landing.deliverable_1: Strategic hero, key sections and clear call-to-actions
landing.deliverable_2: Responsive design, strong speed basics and working form
landing.deliverable_3: SEO base and structure ready for campaigns or WhatsApp traffic
landing.range: Typical closing range: DOP 36,000 to 49,500 / US$600 to US$825

website.name: Professional business website
website.promise: For SMBs that need a more complete presence, stronger trust signals and a website that supports the sales process better.
website.description: A fuller website with stronger information architecture, stronger sections and a more solid premium experience for brand and conversion.
website.deliverable_1: Broader page architecture and clearer messaging structure
website.deliverable_2: Commercial sections, forms and trust-building modules
website.deliverable_3: Premium design ready to support future growth
website.range: Typical closing range: DOP 58,500 to 85,500 / US$975 to US$1,425

system.name: Custom system / web app
system.promise: For businesses that already sell or operate actively and now need more order, visibility and less manual work.
system.description: Custom dashboards, workflows and tools to centralize information and make day-to-day operations more efficient.
system.deliverable_1: Admin dashboard and workflows aligned to a real business goal
system.deliverable_2: Database, modular structure and required integrations
system.deliverable_3: Built to scale in phases without starting over
system.range: Typical closing range: DOP 126,000 to 234,000+ / US$2,100 to US$3,900+
system.terms: Suggested split: 40% upfront / 30% mid-project / 30% on delivery

trust.title: Less noise, more clarity and better execution
trust.subtitle: The process should feel organized, fast and focused on business outcomes

promise_1.title: Fast response
promise_1.description: You do not spend days waiting without context. The process starts with pace and clear communication.

promise_2.title: Strategic design
promise_2.description: The goal is not to fill sections but to guide visitors toward a specific action.

promise_3.title: Clear delivery
promise_3.description: Each stage has a defined purpose so you always understand what is being built and why.

promise_4.title: Post-launch support
promise_4.description: The project is not abandoned once it goes live. A clean handoff and final adjustments are part of the process.

trust.process_title: A short process you can understand without extra complexity
trust.process_desc: The idea is to move quickly from intent into structure, then design, then a launch-ready delivery you can trust.

step_1.title: We define goal and scope
step_1.description: We clarify what you need to sell, who the audience is and which action the visitor should take.

step_2.title: We organize message and structure
step_2.description: Content, hierarchy and visual direction are aligned so the experience supports sales instead of distracting from it.

step_3.title: We build, polish and launch
step_3.description: Everything is assembled, reviewed and prepared to go live with less friction and more confidence.

faq.title: Normal objections before hiring, answered without fluff
faq.subtitle: The questions that actually matter when a business is about to invest in a digital solution
faq.note_text: The idea is not to hide key details. Here is the essential context to understand how the process works, what to expect and how a real project gets defined.
faq.q1: What does an initial proposal actually include?
faq.q1_helper: So the offer does not feel vague or open-ended.
faq.a1: The proposal starts with the commercial goal, the type of website or system, the base scope, estimated timeline and recommended payment structure. If complexity or integrations change, that gets adjusted before work starts, not halfway through without context.
faq.q2: What happens after launch or final delivery?
faq.q2_helper: Because publishing should not feel like abandonment.
faq.a2: The handoff is done in an orderly way. Final details are reviewed, launch support is considered and, when it makes sense, the project can continue through maintenance, focused improvements or ongoing support without rebuilding everything.
faq.q3: How is the final price defined?
faq.q3_helper: So it is clear why a quote can go up or down.
faq.a3: Public pricing is there to give a clear starting point. The final value depends on scope, number of pages, content depth, integrations, visual complexity and whether the project includes internal logic or custom dashboards.
faq.q4: Can I start small and grow later?
faq.q4_helper: In many cases that is the smartest path.
faq.a4: Yes. In fact, that is often the better way to start. You can launch a strong base first, validate how the business responds and then expand structure, automations or new features once the direction is clearer.

contact.title: If the project has real intent, this is where the conversation should start
contact.subtitle: The fastest route is WhatsApp. If you prefer to send context first, you can leave a short request and I will answer with the clearest next step.
contact.primary_channel_text: Ideal if you want to validate the idea, scope or entry price without unnecessary back and forth.
contact.quick_answer_text: When the project has clear context, the conversation moves much faster.
contact.project_entry_text: If you are not sure which format fits best, the first step is orientation and then a grounded proposal.
contact.form_title: Leave the context and I will answer clearly
contact.desc: There is no need to write an essay. Just tell me what you want to build, what problem you want to solve and whether you are looking for a landing page, a fuller website or a system.
contact.form_note_text: Goal, business type, timing and any useful references. The clearer the context, the clearer the recommendation.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Project type
contact.message_placeholder: Tell me what you want to launch, what business it is for and what you would like to solve first.
contact.thanks: Thanks. I have your message and will reply with the next recommended step.
contact.privacy: This form sends your message directly and does not share your information outside the configured delivery channel.
contact.email_fallback: If automatic delivery is not configured yet, your email app will open with the message prepared for you.
contact.error_help: If delivery fails, you can also contact me directly by email or WhatsApp.

whatsapp.message: Hi, I saw MGtechAD and I would like to talk about a project.

footer.desc: Websites and systems built to help your business look better, sell more clearly and operate with more order.
footer.built: Designed with React, Vite and Tailwind CSS.
